content.code: H e l l o ,   w o r l d !

template <int size> // size is the expression parameter
class StaticArray<double, size>: public StaticArray<T, size>

content.text: As an aside…Even if we were able to defineTas a type template parameter, whenStaticArray<double, size>was instantiated, the compiler would need to replace theTinStaticArray<T, size>with an actual type. What actual type would it use? The only type that makes sense isT=double, but that would leaveStaticArray<double, size>inheriting from itself!

What actual type would it use? The only type that makes sense isT=double, but that would leaveStaticArray<double, size>inheriting from itself!
